reviews.review_description: Lovin it so far! Looking forward to future updates

reviews.review_title: This game is indeed leisurely and fun
reviews.review_description: It would be even more ideal if there is a plan for two people to cooperate. This game is indeed leisurely and fun.

Fun game but they should have a level that goes on the freeway and what’s with the bombs? 
That sucks but all in all a fun game so far!

developer_response.body: We greatly appreciate your review and support. We will definitely consider implementing the freeway level in our upcoming updates. Just to clarify, the objects that fall from the tracks and block the way are actually crates, not bombs. However, incorporating bombs may works as well. Thank you once again for your feedback.

reviews.review_description: As my second game that I try on MetaQuest 2 I truly like it, I like how it starts as an easy simple game in first levels then becomes challenging and full of surprises such as crates. Thanks.
